LanguageData.WVC_GeneHolder_RCDesc: Allows the release of held pawns. If auto-release is enabled, a pawn will release its held pawns every two hours while it is busy with tasks. This will continue until it is idle.
LanguageData.WVC_GeneHolded_RCDesc: If enabled, a pawn with no current tasks will automatically request a random holder to hold it. While held, the pawn's time will be significantly slowed.
